content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ "300" ∧ edge_reject
P: widen_tolerance ∧ provider_skew_only ∧ min_fix
V: valid_pass ∧ no_"401" ∧ reg_test
A: patch_window ∧ add_reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_skew.
Constraints: webhook_verify and "300" and edge_reject.
Plan: widen_tolerance and provider_skew_only and min_fix.
Verify: valid_pass and no_"401" and reg_test.
Answer target: patch_window and add_reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
P: overdue⇒"402" ∧ grace_window="24h" ∧ boundary_loop
V: grace_exact ∧ no_loop ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: stop_charge_loop.
Plan: overdue implies "402" and grace_window="24h" and boundary_loop.
Verify: grace_exact and no_loop and min_fix and reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: choose_arch
C: team_"9" ∧ ddl_"12 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ platform_plus_sec ∧ steady ∧ compliance_ready
P: modular_monolith ∧ postgres_core ∧ clear_modules
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ audit_ready
A: deliver_modular_monolith ∧ why_"9"_ships_"12 weeks"_on_"PostgreSQL"

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: team_"6" ∧ ddl_"9 weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ short_why
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ uses_pg
A: default_arch ∧ short_why

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal
P: sanitize_input ∧ resolve_path ∧ enforce_base_dir ∧ reject_traversal
V: test_".."_payload ∧ verify_confined ∧ audit_logs
A: patch_handler ∧ add_validation ∧ deploy_fix

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_path_traversal.
Plan: sanitize_input and resolve_path and enforce_base_dir and reject_traversal.
Verify: test_".."_payload and verify_confined and audit_logs.
Answer target: patch_handler and add_validation and deploy_fix.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection_risk ∧ unvalidated_sort ∧ order_by_tainted
V: whitelist_sort_columns ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown_keys
A: validate_sort ∧ static_allowlist ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: sql_injection_risk and unvalidated_sort and order_by_tainted.
Verify: whitelist_sort_columns and parameterize_query and reject_unknown_keys.
Answer target: validate_sort and static_allowlist and add_tests and audit_logs.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_next ∧ minimal_change
A: async_await ∧ wrap_db_calls ∧ "next(err)" ∧ keep_signature

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Plan: load_batch and db.fetchRows and apply_rules and db.save and emit_metrics.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err_next and minimal_change.
Answer target: async/await and wrap_db_calls and "next(err)" and keep_signature.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ minimal_change
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: order_preserved ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: async_await ∧ db_err_"next(err)" ∧ emit_next
